title: dendrorkis foliosa
intro: Dendrobium foliosum, also known as Dendrobium orchid, is a type of epiphytic orchid native to tropical Asia. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dendrobium foliosum include improving immune function, reducing inflammation, and enhancing cognitive function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or infusion, and it can be found in various forms, including capsules, tablets, and teas.
